title: Lamb Italian Stir Fry
description: A fusion twist on traditional Italian cooking, combining lamb with popular Asian stir fry flavors.
instructions: Season the lamb with salt and pepper.
Heat the garlicky oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb until browned, then set aside.
Add the crispy garlic to the skillet and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the chopped basil and stir fry seasoning (if using) to the skillet and sauté for 1 minute.
Return the lamb to the skillet and stir to combine with the basil mixture.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
